bonuses.stat: When you heal yourself or an ally with an ability, gain a Warming Aura for 10 seconds. While in the Warming Aura, you and group members restore 565 Health every 2 seconds and reduce the cost of Sprint, Block, and Roll Dodge by 5%. This effect can occur once every 12 seconds and the heal scales off the higher of your Max Magicka or Stamina.
